*** 1 INJ *** NWS CHARLESTON SURVEYED THE DAMAGE IN LIBERTY COUNTY AND DETERMINED IT WAS AN EF-1 TORNADO. IT STARTED 3.8 MILES SOUTH SOUTHEAST RICEBORO, LIBERTY COUNTY AND TRAVELED EAST NORTHEAST FOR 7.85 MILES. THE MAXIMUM WIND SPEED WAS 105 MPH AND THE MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH WAS 350 YARDS. ONE TRUCK AND ONE MOTOCYCLIST REPORTEDLY HIT THE DEBRIS ON I-95.

*** 1 INJ *** MULTIPLE VEHICULAR ACCIDENTS DUE TO STORM DEBRIS, BETWEEN MILE MARKERS 70 AND 73 ON I-95. DAMAGE INCLUDED A TRUCK THAT WAS HIT BY STORM DAMAGE DEBRIS, POSSIBLY A TREE, A CAMPER FLIPPED OVER, AND A MOTORCYCLE HIT A DOWNED TREE. THE MOTORCYCLIST WAS INJURED.

A LARGE BUILDING LOCATED ON TURKEY FOUNTAIN WAY HAD MINOR DAMAGE DUE TO WINDS.
